translations.zh-Hans: 老实说，他像隐形了一样。
translations.vi: Thành thật mà nói, anh ấy như vô hình.
translations.hi: सच कहूँ तो, वह अदृश्य है.

tokens.explanation: Sentence-level adverb expressing speaker attitude; modifies the whole clause.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary in present 3sg linking the subject to the predicate.
Predicate adjective describing the subject; agrees in gender/number with ‘il’ (masc sg).

sentences.target: Tes lunettes sont invisibles sur ta tête.

translations.fr: Tes lunettes sont invisibles sur ta tête.
translations.en: Your glasses are invisible on your head.
translations.es: Tus gafas en la cabeza casi no se ven.
translations.de: Deine Brille ist auf deinem Kopf unsichtbar.
translations.it: I tuoi occhiali sono invisibili sulla testa.
translations.ko: 네 머리 위의 안경은 보이지 않아.
translations.zh-Hans: 你头上的眼镜几乎看不见。
translations.yue: 你頭頂嗰副眼鏡好似隱形咁。
translations.ru: Твои очки на голове едва заметны.
translations.pt: Seus óculos ficam quase invisíveis na sua cabeça.
translations.he: המשקפיים שלך בלתי נראים על הראש שלך.
translations.vi: Cặp kính trên đầu bạn gần như không thấy.
translations.nl: Je bril op je hoofd is bijna onzichtbaar.
translations.uk: Твої окуляри на голові майже не видно.
translations.hu: A fejeden lévő szemüveg szinte láthatatlan.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे सिर पर चश्मा दिखाई नहीं देता.
translations.pl: Twoje okulary na głowie są prawie niewidoczne.
translations.el: Τα γυαλιά σου πάνω στο κεφάλι σου είναι σχεδόν αόρατα.
translations.nb: Brillene dine er nesten usynlige på hodet ditt.
translations.id: Kacamatamu di atas kepalamu hampir tidak terlihat.
translations.sv: Dina glasögon på huvudet syns knappt.
translations.ro: Ochelarii tăi de pe cap abia se văd.
translations.cs: Tvoje brýle na hlavě jsou téměř neviditelné.
translations.da: Dine briller på hovedet er næsten usynlige.
translations.fi: Päässäsi olevat silmälasit eivät juuri näy.
translations.ja: 頭の上のメガネはほとんど見えない。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person possessive determiner; agrees in number with the noun (plural) and modifies ‘lunettes’.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary in present 3pl linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Predicate adjective agreeing in number (plural) with ‘lunettes’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
2nd person possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘tête’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Je me sens invisible au travail.

translations.fr: Je me sens invisible au travail.
translations.es: Me siento invisible en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich fühle mich bei der Arbeit unsichtbar.
translations.zh-Hans: 在工作中我觉得自己像隐形人。
translations.yue: 喺公司我覺得自己好似隱形人。
translations.ru: На работе я чувствую себя невидимкой.
translations.pt: No trabalho eu me sinto invisível.
translations.vi: Tôi cảm thấy mình vô hình ở chỗ làm.
translations.ar: في العمل أشعر أنني غير مرئية.
translations.nl: Op het werk voel ik me onzichtbaar.
translations.hi: काम पर मैं खुद को अदृश्य महसूस करती हूँ.
translations.nb: På jobben føler jeg meg usynlig.
translations.id: Di tempat kerja aku merasa tak terlihat.
translations.sv: På jobbet känner jag mig osynlig.
translations.da: På arbejdet føler jeg mig usynlig.
translations.ja: 職場で自分が透明人間みたいに感じる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
1st person clitic object/reflexive pronoun; forms the pronominal verb ‘se sentir’.
Main verb in present 1sg; used pronominally (‘se sentir’) and takes a predicate complement.
Predicative complement after ‘se sentir’; agrees with the subject in gender/number.
Fused form of ‘à’ + ‘le’; preposition introducing the locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’ in ‘au travail’.

sentences.target: Le fil devient invisible dans la lumière.
sentences.reading: /lə fil dəvjɛ̃ ɛ̃vizibl dɑ̃ la lymjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Le fil devient invisible dans la lumière.
translations.ipa: /lə fil dəvjɛ̃ ɛ̃vizibl dɑ̃ la lymjɛʁ/
translations.en: The thread becomes invisible in the light.
translations.es: El hilo se vuelve invisible a la luz.
translations.de: Der Faden wird im Licht unsichtbar.
translations.it: Il filo diventa invisibile alla luce.
translations.zh-Hans: 这根线在光线下变得看不见。
translations.yue: 條線喺光底下會變得睇唔到。
translations.pt: O fio fica invisível na luz.
translations.vi: Sợi chỉ trở nên vô hình dưới ánh sáng.
translations.ar: الخيط يصبح غير مرئي في الضوء.
translations.nl: De draad wordt onzichtbaar in hetlicht.
translations.hu: A cérna a fényben láthatatlanná válik.
translations.hi: रोशनी में धागा अदृश्य हो जाता है.
translations.pl: Nić staje się niewidoczna w świetle.
translations.el: Η κλωστή γίνεται αόρατη στο φως.
translations.id: Benangnya menjadi tak terlihat di bawah cahaya.
translations.cs: Nit se ve světle stává neviditelnou.
translations.ja: 光の中では糸が見えなくなる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘fil’.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present 3sg; change-of-state verb linking the subject to a predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the resulting state of ‘fil’; agrees in gender/number (masc sg).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘lumière’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
